category_sources: Official smallstep/cli README describes step as a CLI for PKI workflows and common crypto and X.509 operations.
source_facts.description says step is a crypto and X.509 Swiss-Army-Knife.
display_name_sources: Official Smallstep README and docs use the step CLI name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to full documentation and installation docs.
Official Smallstep documentation has a dedicated step CLI section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/smallstep/cli, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README lists certificate, CA, crypto, OAuth, and SSH command groups.
source_facts.description identifies crypto and X.509 functionality.
